payload.title: Postgres schema for tenant-scoped event log + cache
payload.description: Define events(tenant_id, event_id ULID, ts, kind, actor JSONB, payload JSONB, PK(tenant_id,event_id)) with index (tenant_id, ts, event_id), plus tenant-scoped ports of tickets/ticket_relations/ticket_comments/ticket_history/workspace and an FTS equivalent (Postgres tsvector, replacing SQLite FTS5). Every cache table carries tenant_id. Blocks the replay and upload stories. (From SCP-124.)
